title: pelargonium glechomoides
intro: Pelargonium glechomoides, also known as the Cape Geranium or Round-leaved Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to aid in the relief of various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium glechomoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as an essential oil in herbal remedies.
